implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Backfill staging directory setting added to Settings
Reviewed payloads publish through same publisher as deterministic re-index
Self-asserted review claims in payload content cannot bypass the gate
Comprehensive test coverage for all acceptance criteria

completion_promises.criterion_text: A backfill staging dir setting (FLEET_MEMORY_BACKFILL_DIR, default backfill/staging/) is added to Settings
completion_promises.evidence: Added backfill_dir field to Settings class in src/fleet_memory/settings.py with default value 'backfill/staging/' and FLEET_MEMORY_ env prefix

completion_promises.criterion_text: A staged payload with an operator review marker present is published through the same relay path and stored as a typed record like any deterministically parsed payload
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented process_backfill_payload() which checks for .reviewed marker file and publishes through publish_episode() from TASK-RIP-002. Test test_reviewed_payload_publishes verifies this behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A staged payload without a review marker is not published
completion_promises.evidence: has_review_marker() returns False when .reviewed file is absent, causing process_backfill_payload() to skip publishing. Test test_unreviewed_payload_gated verifies this gate.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A staged payload whose own content claims it has been reviewed, but for which no operator marker exists, is not published (self-assertion cannot bypass the gate)
completion_promises.evidence: The gate checks only the filesystem marker via has_review_marker() - payload content is never examined for review claims. Test test_self_asserted_review_without_marker_gated proves payloads with reviewed=True in content are still gated without filesystem marker.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Reviewed backfill publishes via the same publisher/relay path as deterministic re-index — no second write code path
completion_promises.evidence: Backfill imports and directly calls publish_episode() from fleet_memory.reindex.publisher (TASK-RIP-002) - there is no duplicate publish path. The seam test test_reviewed_backfill_uses_same_routing verifies content_format=json and payload_type are set correctly.

completion_promises.criterion_text: tests/unit/reindex/test_backfill.py covers: reviewed publishes, unreviewed gated, self-asserted-but-unmarked gated
completion_promises.evidence: Created comprehensive test suite with 6 tests: test_has_review_marker_present, test_has_review_marker_absent, test_reviewed_payload_publishes (reviewed publishes), test_unreviewed_payload_gated (unreviewed gated), test_self_asserted_review_without_marker_gated (self-asserted gated), and test_reviewed_backfill_uses_same_routing (seam test). All tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran black formatter on all modified files - src/fleet_memory/settings.py, src/fleet_memory/reindex/backfill.py, and tests/unit/reindex/test_backfill.py all pass black formatting checks with no errors.
